<frame id="19:1470" name="Our Practice" x="4.547473508864641e-13" y="795" width="390" height="517">
  <frame id="38:1641" name="Frame 1171281906" x="28" y="52" width="350" height="426">
    <frame id="38:1640" name="Group 1171281942" x="0" y="0" width="343" height="151">
      <frame id="47:2224" name="Frame 1171281925" x="0" y="0" width="343" height="151">
        <text id="19:1471" name="Our practice" x="0" y="0" width="343" height="17" />
        <frame id="38:1642" name="Frame 1171281907" x="0" y="30" width="343" height="121">
          <frame id="38:1643" name="Frame 1171281908" x="0" y="0" width="343" height="121">
            <text id="19:1472" name=""The mat is a place to meet yourself honestly, daily, and without performance."" x="0" y="0" width="343" height="79" />
            <text id="19:1473" name="— Acharya, founder" x="0" y="93" width="123" height="28" />
          </frame>
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>
    <frame id="38:1639" name="Frame 1171281905" x="0" y="170" width="340" height="256">
      <text id="32:1598" name="Bodhi is built on a simple idea. Yoga is not a workout, a wellness trend, or a credential. It is a steady, repeatable practice that, over time, returns you to yourself." x="0" y="0" width="340" height="79" />
      <text id="32:1599" name="We teach in the lineage of classical hatha and ashtanga, with grounding in the Yoga Sūtras of Patañjali and the Haṭha Pradīpikā. Our teachers come from working practice — not just certificatio — and our students leave with a discipline they can carry into a class, a clinic, or a quiet morning at home." x="0" y="103" width="340" height="153" />
          </frame>
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>
  </frame>
</frame>
